GeneralComments:
With Nylsvley Conservancy reachable in 11 miles, Fumani Game Lodge has accommodations, a restaurant, an outdoor swimming pool, a garden and a shared lounge. Complimentary WiFi is available throughout the property. There's also a kitchen in some of the units equipped with an a fridge, an a microwave, and an a minibar. Breakfast is available each morning, and includes buffet, à la carte and continental options. The lodge has a terrace. Guests at Fumani Game Lodge are welcome to enjoy table tennis on site, or cycling in the surrounding areas. Anglo Boer War Memorial is 13 miles from the accommodation, while Combretum Game Park is 24 miles from the property. Polokwane International Airport is 78 miles away.
